inputs.name: SRC_DIR

inputs.name: MOV_DIR

inputs.name: DS_DIR

inputs.name: DTA_DIR

inputs.name: TMP_DIR

inputs.description: Log Directory
inputs.name: LOG_DIR

inputs.description: Reject Directory
inputs.name: REJ_DIR

inputs.description: Layout Directory
inputs.name: LAYOUT_DIR

inputs.description: ORACLE Userid
inputs.name: USER

inputs.description: ORACLE Password
inputs.name: PWD

inputs.description: ORACLE Remote Server
inputs.name: RMT_SERV

inputs.description: ORACLE Table Name for FILE_MASTER
inputs.name: ORA_TBL_JOB_SCHED

inputs.description: Filename of file list
inputs.name: FILE_LST

inputs.description: Filename of details for Interimload
inputs.name: FILE_DETAILS

inputs.description: Set to 1 if debugging is necessary
inputs.name: DEBUG

inputs.description: Memory size used for SORT steps
inputs.name: SORTMEM

inputs.description: Pad character
inputs.name: $APT_STRING_PADCHAR

inputs.description: APT Config File for One Node
inputs.name: APT_ONE_NODE

inputs.description: RepExt
inputs.name: RepExt

inputs.description: Counter
inputs.name: Counter

inputs.description: Job invocation ID
inputs.name: DSJobInvocationId

comments.content:
Extract the numbers (0-9) and underscores (_) out the filenames to get match to the TABLE_LST.dat (using awk).
If the parameter (7th) in the steering file contain 'Y' the JOB_FILE_Extend_Skip will be executed, otherwise JOB_FILE_Extend.
Extend delivered file by FILE_ID and maybe SOURCE_CD (depend on file name). Records starting with value of HEADER and empty records will be extracted.
Extend delivered file by FILE_ID and maybe SOURCE_CD (depend on file name). Records starting with value of HEADER and empty records will be extracted. First record will be skipped.
Checks System and if =P8 go to job to extract the date out of the filename otherwise go to Load directly

Depending on parameter the update of MIN Date and/or Time in TBL_JOB_SCHEDULE
To avoid possible deadlocks by updating at the same time one record twice, the update of date and time will be sequenced.
Oracle load of data using RCP

Check if 
warning 
is caused
by rejects
(REJ file-
size >0)
otherwise
the warn-
ings are 
caused by
ASCENTIAL
(see interim
load LOG file)
Change the eWFM date fields with 1 digits numbers into 2 digit numbers for month and day

Extend the
STARTTIME
column of all
AVAYA files
with the 
seconds
(":00") by 
using AWK.
missing header just leads to skip the first data record

Error-Codes which are set there
e.g. "99007"

setting spec. 
Error-Code in 
case of missing 
file-
content-
date
Interim Table LOAD Job-Sequence for IIP Project

inputs.description: Body of the script.
inputs.name: script
inputs.value:
# The original, untranslated routine source code (written in IBM InfoSphere DataStage BASIC language)
# and migration service generated dummy script is saved to the following invoked script file.

echo "IIPExecuteSQLPlus" > $command_name_PATH

echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_InvocationId} > $InvocationId_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_TemporaryPath} > $TemporaryPath_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_DataSource} > $DataSource_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_DatabaseUser} > $DatabaseUser_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_DatabasePassword} > $DatabasePassword_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_Sentence} > $Sentence_PATH

sh /mnts/ds-storage/projects/DATASTAGE test project/scripts/DSU.IIPExecuteSQLPlus.sh

inputs.description: Body of the script.
inputs.name: script
inputs.value:
echo "cat" > $command_name_PATH
cat  ${TMP_DIR}/${Counter}_trail | awk '{ printf "%s\n",$1 }' | awk ' { NR==1?s=$1:s=s "" $1} END { printf "%s",s }'

inputs.description: Body of the script.
inputs.name: script
inputs.value:
# The original, untranslated routine source code (written in IBM InfoSphere DataStage BASIC language)
# and migration service generated dummy script is saved to the following invoked script file.

echo "IIPExecuteSQLPlus" > $command_name_PATH

echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_InvocationId} > $InvocationId_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_TemporaryPath} > $TemporaryPath_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_DataSource} > $DataSource_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_DatabaseUser} > $DatabaseUser_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_DatabasePassword} > $DatabasePassword_PATH
echo ${IIPExecuteSQLPlus_Sentence} > $Sentence_PATH

sh /mnts/ds-storage/projects/DATASTAGE test project/scripts/DSU.IIPExecuteSQLPlus.sh

inputs.description: The runtime type for a bash script execution
inputs.name: runtime_type

value_from.expression: "UPDATE TBL_JOB_SCHEDULE a SET a.FILE_CONTENT_DATE = (SELECT MIN(b." + ds.Trim('1') + ") FROM " + ds.Trim('1') + " b WHERE b.FILE_ID = (SELECT max(b1.FILE_ID) FROM TBL_JOB_SCHEDULE b1 WHERE b1.FILE_NAME = '" + params.Counter + "' AND b1.STATUS = '  ')) WHERE a.FILE_NAME = '" + params.Counter + "' AND a.STATUS = '  '"

inputs.description: Optional. An action taken when the run has failed.
inputs.name: error_policy

outputs.description: Command name of the inline script
outputs.name: command_name

outputs.description: The status of the job. One of: "Completed", "CompletedWithWarnings", "CompletedWithErrors", "Failed", "Canceled"
outputs.name: status

env_variables.name: env_variables
